Caption: Summary of battery models used for market studies (the contribution of this work highlighted using a lighter shade).
Experimental aging behaviour in the NMC batteries [34].
Cumulative degradation function. Annotations to clarify the implementation of the incremental cost formulation (13)–(17) are shown in a lighter shade of blue.
